jsonLd.title: DTDC is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
